stat: UK businesses now using AI for marketing or content work
method: Recipe B (combination cut) — combining BCC/Essex SME AI adoption and marketing-use-case share with gov.uk's UK business population estimate

sources_used.title: Half of SMEs using AI, with limited headcount impact so far (BCC and University of Essex, with Atos, March 2026)
Business population estimates for the UK and regions 2024: statistical release

workings: BCC/Essex/Atos March 2026 survey: 54% of UK SMEs use AI in some form; of AI-using SMEs, marketing is a joint-top use case at 72% (tied with admin). 0.54 x 0.72 = 0.3888, i.e. 38.88% of the UK private-sector business population. Applied to gov.uk's 5,499,000 UK private-sector businesses (2024 estimate): 0.3888 x 5,499,000 = 2,138,011, rounded to 'roughly 2.1 million'.
